# Alpha Book · ch-1 — Source Page

## Claims
- ch-1: HRV reflects autonomic nervous-system balance over a resting epoch
- ch-1: Higher resting HRV correlates with better recovery in trained athletes
- ch-1: RMSSD captures parasympathetic activity over short windows
